title: Trachelosiphon cogniauxii
taxonomy: Trachelosiphon cogniauxii belongs to the family Annonaceae. It is a genus of flowering plants in the order Magnoliales. Trachelosiphon cogniauxii is native to West Africa. The classification of this plant is further divided into species based on its characteristics and morphology. It is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within the Annonaceae family.
constituents: Trachelosiphon cogniauxii is a plant species, but information on its active constituents is limited.
